caseName: Peter Faucitt v. Jacqueline Faucitt et al.

criticalRevelation.summary: Dan & Kay Shopify platform paid by Dan & Jax UK company RegimA Zone Ltd
criticalRevelation.details: The Shopify platform has been owned and paid for since July 2023 by Daniel Faucitt's independent UK entity RegimA Zone Ltd (28+ months, R140K-R280K total investment).
criticalRevelation.implication: RWD ZA actually has no revenue stream of its own - all revenues were generated through infrastructure owned, paid for, and operated by Daniel's UK company.
criticalRevelation.significance: RWD merely issued invoices for sales occurring on a platform it neither owned nor funded, undermining claims of independent business operations.

categories.name: Revenue Theft
categories.description: Systematic revenue hijacking scheme targeting RegimA business operations

categories.name: Family Trust Violations
categories.description: Coordinated family trust manipulation and fiduciary duty breaches

categories.name: Financial Flows
categories.description: Systematic financial manipulation and unauthorized fund diversions

events.title: Trust Structure Establishment
events.crimeType: Fraudulent trust establishment, fiduciary duty violations
events.description: Fraudulent trust establishment with intentional structural flaws creating foundation for systematic asset misappropriation.
events.legalSignificance: Initial documentation of trust structure manipulation

events.title: Payment Redirection Scheme
events.description: Systematic redirection of customer payments to unauthorized accounts, beginning coordinated financial fraud.
events.legalSignificance: Initial implementation of systematic financial fraud scheme
events.shopifyNote: Payments redirected from platform owned and paid for by RegimA Zone Ltd (UK)
events.shopifyRevelation: Customer payments were for sales on a Shopify platform continuously funded by Dan's UK company, not RWD ZA

events.title: Bank Account Change Letter
events.crimeType: Fraudulent redirection of funds, theft by conversion
events.description: Rynette Farrar sends fraudulent letter to clients redirecting payments to unauthorized accounts.
events.legalSignificance: First documented act in coordinated scheme
events.shopifyNote: Bank changes targeted revenue from Shopify platform paid by Dan's UK company
events.shopifyRevelation: Attempted to redirect payments for sales on infrastructure owned and paid by RegimA Zone Ltd

events.title: Unauthorized Beneficiary Changes
events.crimeType: Trust deed violations, unauthorized beneficiary amendments
events.description: Peter Faucitt and Rynette Farrar coordinate unauthorized modifications to trust beneficiaries.
events.legalSignificance: Direct violation of trust obligations and beneficiary rights

events.title: Unauthorized Transfers (R850K+)
events.crimeType: Unauthorized fund transfers, breach of fiduciary duty
events.description: Large-scale unauthorized financial transfers from business accounts by Peter Faucitt.
events.legalSignificance: Direct evidence of financial authority abuse and theft
events.shopifyNote: Transfers included revenue from Shopify platform funded by RegimA Zone Ltd
events.shopifyRevelation: R850K+ transferred included revenue from platform paid by Dan's UK company over 28 months

events.title: Shopify Audit Trail Hijacking
events.crimeType: Evidence destruction, computer fraud, business sabotage
events.description: Complete destruction of Shopify audit trails 7 days after Jax confrontation. 100% business shutdown.
events.legalSignificance: Central evidence destruction event proving consciousness of guilt
events.shopifyNote: CRITICAL: Audit trail destroyed for platform continuously paid by Dan & Jax UK company (RegimA Zone Ltd) - evidence that RWD ZA has no independent revenue stream
events.shopifyRevelation: Destruction of audit trails for platform owned, paid for, and operated by RegimA Zone Ltd (UK) since July 2023, proving RWD ZA generated no independent revenue

events.title: Domain Registration (Identity Fraud)
events.description: Rynette's son (Addarory) registers domain for customer base theft and revenue diversion infrastructure.
events.legalSignificance: Family conspiracy escalation and digital impersonation
events.shopifyNote: Domain registered to impersonate platform owned by RegimA Zone Ltd (UK)
events.shopifyRevelation: Identity fraud to impersonate legitimate business operating on Dan's UK-funded infrastructure

events.title: Systematic Trust Violations
events.crimeType: Fiduciary duty breach, trust asset mismanagement
events.description: Peter Faucitt breaches fiduciary duties with unauthorized use of trust assets for personal benefit.
events.legalSignificance: Clear evidence of trustee misconduct and self-dealing

events.title: Email Impersonation Pattern
events.crimeType: Email hijacking, identity theft, business impersonation, computer fraud
events.description: Rynette Farrar controls pete@regima.com email for systematic hijacking and fraudulent directives.
events.impact: R3.1M+ losses enabled by email control
events.legalSignificance: Pattern of impersonation supporting criminal conspiracy charges
events.shopifyNote: Email control used to issue directives about platform paid by RegimA Zone Ltd
events.shopifyRevelation: Email impersonation facilitated fraud related to Shopify platform Dan's UK company had been paying for since July 2023

events.title: Coordinated Fund Diversions
events.crimeType: Systematic fund diversion, money laundering indicators
events.description: Multi-account coordination involving multiple financial institutions in complex transaction structuring.
events.legalSignificance: Evidence of sophisticated financial crime coordination
events.shopifyNote: Diverted funds from Shopify sales on platform owned by Dan's UK entity
events.shopifyRevelation: Fund diversions targeted revenue generated on infrastructure continuously funded by RegimA Zone Ltd

events.title: Warehouse POPI Violations
events.crimeType: Business sabotage, POPI violations, employee endangerment
events.description: Pete stops warehouse Shopify operations with POPI violations and employee endangerment.
events.legalSignificance: Documented evidence of systematic business destruction
events.shopifyNote: Shutdown of operations for platform continuously funded by RegimA Zone Ltd (28 months)
events.shopifyRevelation: Business sabotage of operations running on platform paid by Dan & Jax UK company since July 2023

events.title: Account Manipulation
events.crimeType: Bank account manipulation, unauthorized control seizure
events.description: Bank account manipulation and complete control seizure of legitimate business banking operations.
events.legalSignificance: Documented evidence of financial system abuse and unauthorized control
events.shopifyNote: Control seized over accounts receiving Shopify revenue from Dan's UK-paid platform
events.shopifyRevelation: Seized control of accounts receiving revenue from Shopify platform owned and funded by RegimA Zone Ltd

events.title: Trust Asset Misappropriation
events.crimeType: Trust asset theft, breach of fiduciary duty
events.description: Systematic removal of trust assets from legitimate control through coordinated asset removal scheme.
events.legalSignificance: Documented theft of trust property and breach of fiduciary duty

events.title: Trust Breach Evidence
events.description: Comprehensive documentation of continuing trust violations and evidence concealment attempts.
events.legalSignificance: Systematic evidence of ongoing trust law violations

events.title: Financial Evidence Concealment
events.description: Systematic concealment of financial crime evidence through record destruction and transaction manipulation.
events.legalSignificance: Consciousness of guilt through evidence destruction attempts
events.shopifyNote: Concealment of evidence showing Shopify platform paid by RegimA Zone Ltd, not RWD ZA
events.shopifyRevelation: Cover-up attempt to conceal fact that RWD ZA has no independent revenue stream - all revenue from Dan's UK-funded Shopify platform

shopifyPlatformFacts.rwdZARole: Issued invoices for sales on platform it did not own or fund
shopifyPlatformFacts.keyImplication: RWD ZA has no independent revenue stream

criminalCharges: Trust Law Violations (Trust Property Control Act)
